creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Has this been merged to stable/11 already (mfc-stable +), or is it pending? base r362396 did't have an MFC flag, so unsure.

If its already been merged, please add a "base rXXXXX" to autolink to the merge commit in a comment and set mfc-stable12 to + again, otherwise please reference this PR: in a subsequent merge and set it to + after the merge is complete
